title: 第 130 節
en: Suras, how the word was formed, 187.
Sttras, alone almost unintelligible, — laws of Manu existed first as, τότ. — and their commentaries, 370.
Talmud and Christian doctrines, 9, — no bridge to another life in the, — strife between soul and body, 201.
Tangiia, iron-wood tree for souls, Tartarus, 217.
— stillness and silence taught by, — discouraged extreme penance, — led an active life, 529.
Temple, Dr., on the personality of God, 235.
— his Latin equivalents for Logos, — on the Son of God, 461.
zh: I appreciate your detailed instructions, but I notice that the English source text you've provided appears incomplete or corrupted: "——style, (97, 127, 130, 132," 133;" This appears to be only a fragment with page numbers in parentheses, rather than a complete passage from Müller's *Introduction to the Science of Religion* (1873) that would be meaningful to translate. Could you please provide the full English text passage you'd like me to translate? Once you share the complete sentence or paragraph, I'll translate it into Traditional Chinese following all your specifications precisely.
蘇特羅（Sttras）——單獨幾乎不可理解——《摩奴法典》最初是作為（τότ. ——）而存在的，及其註釋，370。
斯瓦爾迦羅卡（Svargaloka），159、171。斯瓦爾迦世界（Svarga-world），120。
史瓦達凱圖及其父親，285-290。夏摩，120。
安提阿宗教會議，公元412年。
《塔木德》與基督教教義，9；在該書中沒有通往來世的橋樑，——靈魂與肉體之間的衝突，201。
坦基亞（Tangiia）、靈魂的鐵木樹、塔爾塔魯斯（Tartarus），217。
——靜寂與沉默的教誨，——勸阻極端的苦行，——過著活躍的生活，529。
Telang 先生，99 頁第 2 則。
坦普爾博士，論上帝的人格性，235。
— 他對於邏各斯（Logos）的拉丁文對應詞，— 論上帝之子，461。
